name: Nebula Cloud
description: An interactive space-themed nebular cloud with fluid movement.

schema.label: Particle Count
schema.description: Number of gas blobs in the nebula. Higher values increase density but may impact performance.

schema.label: Drift Speed
schema.description: How fast the nebula drifts and pulses on its own.

schema.label: Click Attraction
schema.description: How strongly the gas condenses when you click and hold.

schema.label: Cloud Size
schema.description: The radius of individual gas blobs. Larger values create a thicker, smudgier cloud.

schema.label: Flow Back Speed
schema.description: How quickly the cloud returns to its original shape after being dispersed.
